notes: For 10G, you can either pay 500$ setup, or bring your own optic
Note: SIX has no MRC, it operates on NRC + sponsoring
bgpq tool for filtering from RIPE DB
100G on LAN2 free if you have a paid port on LAN1 of the same or bigger capacity, no membership fee as already paid for LAN1
Flat rate pricing for up to 10G
TORIX has fractional rates for 40% utilisation, actual port purchase may be cheaper
10GE port is free until utilisation is over 1GE
40G is 1200 eur/month, 25G ports are 400 eur/month, while 1GE Port is 1eur/month.
Pricing is 'hidden' behind their portal, however you can make a free account
Includes a lifetime membership, tiered pricing is available (4G at 205 EUR MRC, 40G at 1.370 EUR MRC)
There is an unspecified NRC for 100GE
2500€ for additional 100G ports and 250€ for additional 10G ports.  Colo 4RU included.

Prices include membership in the consortium. If you don't join the consortium, monthly prices are higher, but you don't need to pay 2k/year. For any additional port on the same POP, 10% discount applies
Pricing varies per city, we picked the least restrictive pricing
Route server configuration is done manually and verified through Whois
MSK-IX has a rather unique concept of 'overload charges', please carefully read the linked PDF
no public pricing available, exchange is free but you pay for the port
